compiled_state.title: Create shared prior-art search prompt fragment
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Create the shared prior-art search prompt fragment that agents consult before writing or modifying code. Makes all RED tests from task f294-e73d pass (GREEN). Remove RED marker from .test-index.

File: plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md

Content sections (all done definitions addressed):
1. ## Bright-Line Triggers - Enumerable checklist of when agents must search for prior art
2. ## Trust Validation Gate - Hard blockers (open bugs, CI failures) evaluated first causing untrusted; soft signals (tests, usage) only when no hard blockers
3. ## Tiered Search Protocol - Project docs first, narrow GitHub ~6 calls, broad outcome ~10 calls, user escalation
4. ## Routine Exclusions - single-file logic changes, test reversions, formatting/lint fixes
5. ## Relationship to Empirical Validation Directive - >=5 lines clarifying complementary boundary (prior-art = should I search, EVD = how do I validate assumptions)
6. ## Non-Interactive Fallback - Structured output schema for sub-agent contexts

Pattern reference: plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/value-effort-scorer.md

File Impact:
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md (create)
- .test-index (edit - remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All structural/content validation tests pass (GREEN) - Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-structure.sh
- [ ] Test gate exits 0 (full suite green) - Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Prompt fragment exists and non-empty - Verify: test -s plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index - Verify: ! grep -q 'prior-art-search.md.*\[test_fragment_file_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] EVD section has substantive content >= 5 lines - Verify: awk '/Empirical Validation/{found=1; next} found && /^##/{exit} found{print}' plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/prior-art-search.md | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (RED tests already exist from f294-e73d) ✓
